name: id
description: AIS Message type

name: nmea
description: NMEA 0183 coded ais message string as received from the source.  This includes the tagblock and if this is a multi-line message type, then the lines will concatenated

name: source
description: Source system that supplied the message

name: tagblock_timestamp
description: This is the unix timestamp for the time the message was received by the original receiver.  You should use this as the effective timestamp for the message

name: uuid
description: RFC 4122 Unique identifier for this message.  Can be used for de-duplication.  Generated by ais-tools from source, nmea and tagblock_timestamp

name: error
description: Decode error message.  This is present if the message failed to decode

name: ais_version
description: Class A AIS version indicator

name: assigned_mode
description: 0 = Station operating in autonomous and continuous mode (default). 1 = Station operating in assigned mode

name: aton_status
description: Aids-to-Navigation (AtoN) Status - Reserved for the indication of the AtoN status 0 = default

name: aton_type
description: Aids-to-Navigation (AtoN) Type - 0 = not available

name: band_flag
description: Class B band flag. 0 = Capable of operating over the upper 525 kHz band of the marine band. 1 = Capable of operating over the whole marine band. (irrelevant if “Class B Message 22 flag” is 0)

name: callsign
description: Radio call sign of the MMSI-registered vessel

name: cog
description: Course over ground in degrees

name: commstate_flag
description: Communication state selector flag. 0 = SOTDMA.  1 = ITDMA.   Should always be 1 for class B CS mode (unit_flag = 1)

name: day
description: Base station report UTC day; 1-31; 0 = UTC day not available = default

name: destination
description: Name of the vessel's destination

name: dim_a
description: Distance to the bow in meters.

name: dim_b
description: Distance to the stern in meters

name: dim_c
description: Distance to port in meters

name: dim_d
description: Distance to starboard in meters

name: display_flag
description: Class B display flag. 0 = No display available; not capable of displaying Message 12 and 14. 1 = Equipped with integrated display displaying Message 12 and 14

name: draught
description: Maximum present static draught; 0-25.5; 0 = not available

name: dsc_flag
description: Class B DSC flag. 0 = Not equipped with DSC function. 1 = Equipped with DSC function (dedicated or time-shared)

name: dte
description: Data terminal equipment (DTE) ready (0 = available, 1 = not available)

name: eta_day
description: Estimated time of arrival, day 1-31; 0 = not available

name: eta_hour
description: Estimated time of arrival, hour 0-23; 24 = not available

name: eta_minute
description: Estimated time of arrival, minute 0-59; 60 = not available

name: eta_month
description: Estimated time of arrival, month 1-12; 0 = not available

name: fix_type
description: Type of electronic position fixing device. 0 = Undefined (default); 1 = GPS, 2 = GLONASS, 3 = combined GPS/GLONASS, 4 = Loran-C, 5 = Chayka, 6 = integrated navigation system, 7 = surveyed; 8 = Galileo, 9-14 = not used, 15 = internal GNSS

name: gnss
description: Position latency 0 = Reported position latency is less than 5 seconds; 1 = Reported position latency is greater than 5 seconds

name: hour
description: Base station report UTC hour; 0-23; 24 = UTC hour not available = default;

name: imo_num
description: IMO number

name: keep_flag
description: ITDMA keep flag. If set to 1, the slot remains allocated for one additional frame

name: m22_flag
description: Class B Message 22 flag.  0 = No frequency management via Message 22, operating on AIS 1, AIS 2 only.  1 = Frequency management via Message 22

name: minute
description: Base station report UTC minute; 0-59; 60 = UTC minute not available = default

name: mmsi
description: Maritime Mobile Service Identity (MMSI)

name: month
description: Base station report UTC month; 1-12; 0 = UTC month not available = default;

name: name
description: Vessel name

name: nav_status
description: The status field in the raw orbcomm message that corresponds to the navigational status.

name: off_pos
description: AtoN Off-position indicator.

name: parser
description: software version of the parser used to parse NMEA into fields

name: part_num
description: Message 24 part number.  If 0 then this is AIS 24 part A.  Otherwise it is part B

name: position_accuracy
description: Position accuracy.  1 = high (<10 m); 0 = low (>10 m)

name: raim
description: RAIM (Receiver autonomous integrity monitoring) flag of electronic position fixing device; 0 = RAIM not in use = default; 1 = RAIM in use

name: received_stations
description: SOTDMA received stations. Number of other stations (not own station) which the station currently is receiving (between 0 and 16 383).

name: repeat_indicator
description: Used by an AIS repeater to indicate how many times a message has been repeated

name: rot_over_range
description: Flag indicating that the rot field is out of valid range and does not represent an actual rate of turn.  If this is true, then value in rot between 709 and 730 indicates faster than 708 degrees per minute and rot > 730 indicates no turn information available

name: rot
description: Rate of turn in degrees per minute, from -708 to 708 where negative indicates turn to the left and positive is turn to the right.  See also rot_over_range

name: second
description: Base station report UTC second; 0-59; 60 = UTC second not available = default

name: slot_increment
description: ITDMA slot increment

name: slot_number
description: SOTDMA slot number

name: slot_offset
description: SOTDMA slot offset

name: slot_timeout
description: SOTDMA slot timeout

name: slots_to_allocate
description: ITDMA Number of consecutive slots to allocate

name: sog
description: Speed over ground in knots

name: spare
description: Not used. Should be set to zero. Reserved for future use

name: spare2
description: Not used. Should be set to zero. Reserved for future use

name: spare3
description: Not used. Should be set to zero. Reserved for future use

name: special_manoeuvre
description: Special manoeuvre indicator 0 = not available 1 = not engaged in special manoeuvre 2 = engaged in special manoeuvre

name: sync_state
description: SOTDMA sync state

name: tagblock_channel
description: AIS radio channel used for this message.  A or B.  This is not the same as AIS class A or B

name: tagblock_groupsize
description: Number of message parts (sentences) that make up this message

name: tagblock_id
description: This is the group identifier for multi-sentence messages

name: tagblock_sentence
description: This is the sentence number for grouping multi-sentence messages.  Because the parts have been grouped before parsing, this is always 1

name: tagblock_station
description: Id of the receiving station. This can indicate the satellite or terrestrial receiver

name: tagblock_T
description: Same as tagblock_timestamp, human readable version

name: timestamp
description: WARNING: This is NOT the timestamp for the message.  See tagblock_timestamp instead.   This field is the UTC second when the message was transmitted.  61 indicates manual input, 62 indicates gps is in estimated (dead reckoning) mode, 63 indicates the gps is inoperative

name: transmission_ctl
description: Transmission control for long-range broadcast message

name: true_heading
description: compass heading in degrees.  511 indicates not available

name: type_and_cargo
description: Type of ship and cargo type

name: unit_flag
description: Class B unit flag. 0 = Class B SOTDMA unit, 1 = Class B “CS” unit

name: utc_hour
description: SOTDMA timeout UTC hour

name: utc_min
description: SOTDMA timeout UTC minute

name: utc_spare
description: SOTDMA timeout spare bits

name: vendor_id
description: Unique identification of the ais hardware unit by a number as defined by the manufacturer

name: virtual_aton
description: Virtual AtoN flag; 0 = default = real AtoN at indicated position; 1 = virtual AtoN, does not physically exist

name: x
description: Longitude in degrees

name: y
description: Latitude in degrees

name: year
description: Base station report UTC year; 1-9999; 0 = UTC year not available

name: extra
description: Extra fields stored as JSON

name: ingest_source
description: Specifies the pipeline input from which NMEA sentences were read (e.g., Pub/Sub subscription, GCS bucket). This refers to the ingestion channel used by the parser, not the original data provider (source).

name: parse_timestamp
description: Timestamp when the NMEA messages was parsed. This serves as a reference for processing latency, distinct from the event time in the message.

name: ingest_timestamp
description: Timestamp when the NMEA messages was ingested. This serves as a reference for processing latency, distinct from the event time in the message.
